pi_items.source: Verified from the task description and verifier.py which expects the agent to create this directory.
Verified from the task description which instructs the agent to set a 'Daily' schedule, and ManageEngine documentation confirms this is a valid option.
Verified from install_eventlog_analyzer.sh which defines ELA_HOME and installs the application to this path.
Verified from the task description instructing to create '~/backup_config_done.txt' and setup_task.sh which manages this file for the 'ga' user.

privileged_info_summary: ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer is installed at /opt/ManageEngine/EventLog. The expected database backup path is /opt/ManageEngine/EventLog/backup with a Daily schedule. The agent must create a confirmation file at /home/ga/backup_config_done.txt.
